author: Haroen Viaene
subject: feat(routing): include repeated indexId in URL correctly (#5134)
body:
Before this PR the deepest nested indexId takes "complete control" of its indexId, and thus widgets mounted deeper didn't get "registered"

Added a new test to the existing getUiState describe, as well as an e2e-style "routing has correct url" file that can be used for other cases later.

CR-2067
